text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, while walking past the<n>station, I see a
pair of familiar faces<n>calling out to passersby.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Um, h-hello! We're having an, uh,<n>event, at, um,
Tracen Academy, so,<n>um...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
The student council is having an<n>event! Do feel
free to take a flyer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm so sorry, I'm really bad at this.<n>I'm not
helping at all, am I?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry about it. You're doing<n>just fine. I'm
sure you'll get the<n>hang of it once—

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...Sorry. I've just received a text from<n>the
president.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Return to the academy ASAP. Oh?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I was hoping to at least hand out half<n>of these,
but oh well. Back to school it<n>is.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...Please go on ahead. I'll stay here<n>and keep
handing out flyers.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Are you sure? You might have to deal<n>with
gawkers or talk to people you<n>aren't comfortable
with...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I know... But I really want to help you<n>out for
once.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...All right. Just don't push yourself<n>too hard,
okay?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Breathe in... Breathe out... Okay. I can<n>do this. I
just need to announce that<n>we're holding an
event...

text_block_list.name: Male Passerby
text_block_list.text:
An event? Tracen Academy is doing<n>something?
Yeah, I think I might grab<n>a flyer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh?! G-go ahead.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Th-that was just a practice run. Next<n>time, I'm
going to speak clearly and<n>hand out the flyers
myself!

text_block_list.name: Tourist Group
text_block_list.text:
Ooh! Is she from Tracen Academy?<n>Oh, she's
looking this way! Hellooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Ignore... the stares. Ignore... the...<n>s-stares...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I... I can't do it! What should I do? I<n>went and told
Air Groove I could<n>handle this.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
And after I made up my mind that I<n>wouldn't let
any obstacle get in my<n>way...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'll scale any walls that stand in my<n>way! This is
what you meant when<n>you were talking about
working<n>toward becoming your ideal self, right,
Kawakami?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I was so sure, but in the end, I... I...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober is trembling in distress.<n>I wonder if
there's anything I can say<n>to assuage her fears?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober is trembling in distress.<n>I wonder if
there's anything I can say<n>to assuage her fears?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Ah, here yo—wait, you're...

text_block_list.name: Passersby
text_block_list.text:
Flyers? Is there some kind of event<n>going on?
Whoa! Tracen Academy's<n>putting on an event?!

text_block_list.name: Passersby
text_block_list.text:
Oh, they're having a raffle for<n>autographs too! Oh
my gosh, yeah!<n>Can I get a flyer, please?! Me
too, me<n>too!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Wh-what?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Perhaps I called out to her a littletoo loudly. So many people arerushing over, there's no way she canpossibly handle them alone!
choice_data_list: I-I'll help you hand those out!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I don't believe it. I handed out all the<n>flyers?
Seriously?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Uh... I wasn't asking you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...Thanks. I couldn't have handed<n>them all out
without you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
All of them, you say? You mean you<n>finished
handing them out?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Air Groove!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Incredible. You surpassed all my<n>expectations. I
guess my worries<n>were unfounded.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Dober, you've really changed. I'm<n>pleased to
see how much you've<n>grown.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh, thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
But I didn't accomplish this alone. I<n>had help. So
really...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Heh, forget about all that for now.<n>You'll figure it
out one day.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
But your efforts really have helped.<n>So, I'll say
this...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: That was directed at you too, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Um, I also wanted to say... You helped,<n>uh, a bit...
Bye.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Um! I also wanted to say... Thank you<n>so, so
much!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Maybe it's the pride she feels at<n>having
distributed all the flyers, but<n>when I catch a brief
glimpse of<n>Mejiro Dober's profile, I see a smile
on her face.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Eek! The wind's too strong! Oh no!<n>The flyers
are getting blown away!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Suddenly, a strong gust of wind<n>scatters all the
flyers! In a panic, I<n>rush to help gather them up...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... I think we somehowmanaged to get all of them, but...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Sorry, I'm finally ba—oh, what<n>happened here?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I see. That sounds like quite the<n>disaster.
...Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...A-Air Groove, I'm so sor—

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Well done. You did the best you could.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You used to be too timid to even put<n>yourself out
there. I'm pleased to see<n>how much you've
grown.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
But I... I said I'd take care of it for<n>you, and I
couldn't even hand out a<n>single flyer.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Heh, forget about all that for now.<n>You'll figure it
out one day.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Thanks for your help too, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober returns to the academy<n>deep in
thought, pondering the<n>meaning behind Air
Groove's words.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh? Wait, that badge on your collar...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...No thanks. And don't give me your<n>trainer spiel,
either.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, but I don't want to bother<n>one of the
academy's trainers. I<n>appreciate the sentiment,
though.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Hmph! You're so nosy! I can do thisby myself! I have to do this bymyself!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: No, really, I'm okay. I should do this<n>by myself!

text_block_list.name: Student Passersby
text_block_list.text:
What's this? What's all the<n>commotion about?
Looks like they're<n>passing out flyers? What for?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh! Um!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Hey! ...Oh, fine!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Oh... you're just too nice. You'll be<n>stuck here all
day at this rate.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Without giving her much of a chance<n>to refuse
my help, I start handing out<n>the flyers...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Phew... We still have half of theflyers left, but it's already gettingdark. If we just keep going for a littlelonger...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
No need. Well done, you've handed<n>out more
than enough.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Air Groove!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Wow, you really handed out half of<n>them. You
went all out.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...You've really grown, Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Oh, n-not at all. I was just kicking up<n>a
commotion.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
In the end, I still needed help getting<n>people's
attention and handing out<n>flyers. So really...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Heh, forget about all that for now.<n>You'll figure it
out one day.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
But your efforts really have helped<n>me out. So,
thank you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: That was directed at you too, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...I didn't ask you to help, but...<n>thanks. I guess.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Yes! I'm sorry for all the trouble!<n>Thank you very
much!
